data.title: Landscape Innovations named 2025 top-rated Fayetteville Landscaper by Find Local Landscapers for outstanding client reviews.
data.description: A highly reputable landscape design and installation company known as Landscape Innovations has been honored as one of the top Fayetteville Landscapers in 2025 by Find Local Landscapers for exceptional client ratings. This recognition is awarded to local landscapers with outstanding reviews, showcasing their commitment to providing excellent service to customers.

data.title: Georgia Recovery Campus partners with First Steps Recovery, supported by Avesi Partners. Brentwood Capital Advisors serves as financial advisor.
data.description: Brentwood Capital Advisors, based in Nashville, Tennessee, acted as the sole financial advisor to Georgia Recovery Campus (GRC) in a recent deal on December 4, 2025. BCA assisted GRC as their exclusive financial advisor in this transaction. The specific financial details and terms of the deal were not disclosed.

data.title: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink says sovereign wealth funds are purposefully buying Bitcoin, with institutions accumulating BTC at $120k, $100k, and $80k levels.
data.description: At The New York Times DealBook Summit, BlackRock's CEO Larry Fink discussed the significant changes occurring in the global financial system, attributing it to the rise of stablecoins, prediction markets, tokenization, and regulatory reform. Fink highlighted Bitcoin's crucial role in this transformation, emphasizing that various sovereign wealth funds are acquiring Bitcoin strategically. These institutions are reportedly making purchases at specific price points, including around $120,000, $100,000, and the $80,000s. Fink clarified that these entities view Bitcoin as more than just a trading tool.

data.title: Carisma Therapeutics (OTCID: CARM) to voluntarily delist from Nasdaq, Board approved decision.
data.description: Philadelphia-based company Carisma Therapeutics Inc. (OTCID: CARM) revealed plans to voluntarily delist its common stock from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC. The decision was approved by the Board of Directors and marks a significant move for the Company. The delisting process signifies a strategic shift, and shareholders will need to consider their next steps as a result.

data.title: Global agricultural microbials market set to grow significantly by 2032, driven by biotech innovations impacting agri-business strategies.
data.description: A recent report on the Agricultural Microbials Market forecasts global growth from 2025 to 2032. Key executives are emphasizing the importance of agricultural microbials for sustainability, compliance, and agile supply chain management. These biological solutions are becoming central to enterprise strategies, with leaders using them to ensure the future success of operations in the rapidly evolving agri-food industry. The report highlights the significant impact agricultural microbials will have on the market.

data.title: Reko International Group Inc. (TSX-V: REKO) declared $0.20 per share cash dividend, payable on Jan 16, 2026.
data.description: In Windsor, Ontario, Reko International Group Inc. (TSX-V: REKO) revealed the declaration of a cash dividend amounting to $0.20 per common share. This dividend is set to be paid on January 16, 2026, to shareholders of record as of December 16, 2025, with the ex-dividend date falling on December 13, 2025. Shareholders are advised to update their contact details, particularly their mailing address with Odyssey Trust Company, to facilitate the timely distribution of the dividend. The company made this announcement indicating the forthcoming dividend payout to its shareholders.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigating claims for Telix Pharmaceuticals investors from Feb 21, 2025 to Aug 28, 2025. Losses? Contact James Wilson.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, the Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who faced losses in Telix to reach out to him directly for a consultation on their available options. If you bought or obtained securities in Telix within the period of February 21, 2025, to August 28, 2025, and are interested in discussing this matter further, please contact him.

data.title: Consumer prices saw a slight increase in September according to the delayed PCE report due to the government shutdown.
data.description: Due to the recent government shutdown, the latest update on the Personal Consumption Expenditures index has been postponed. This key economic indicator, which measures the amount of money spent by consumers on goods and services, is crucial for assessing the state of the economy. The delay in releasing this information has caused instability and uncertainty among investors and policymakers. The index, which includes data on various sectors such as housing, healthcare, and entertainment, is eagerly awaited by economists and analysts alike as it provides valuable insights into consumer spending patterns. The postponement of this update has significantly impacted decision-making processes and market predictions.

data.title: Fed inflation rate below forecast, prompting expectations of rate cut. S&P 500 rallies post news.
data.description: Inflation is currently lower than the Federal Reserve's predicted rate. This decrease makes a rate cut by the Fed very likely. Following this news, the S&P 500 saw a significant increase in value, leading to a rally in the market.

data.title: Victoria's Secret (VSCO) saw shares rise after reporting Q3 net sales of $1.472 billion, up 9% from last year. Short interest rose to 10.92M shares representing 22.79% of the public float, with a daily average of 2.10M shares traded. The operating loss was $19 million, while net loss came in at $37 million. Adjusted EPS was $(0.27). CEO Hillary Super noted, “We delivered a standout third quarter.”
data.description: Victoria's Secret & Co. (VSCO) saw a significant surge in its shares after reporting its third-quarter results, which showed net sales of $1.472 billion - a rise of 9% from the previous year. The sales outperformed the company's communicated guidance range of $1.390 billion to $1.420 billion. The short interest in Victoria's Secret also increased from 9.61 million to 10.92 million shares in the last period, representing 22.79% of the public float. With an average of 2.10 million shares traded daily, this indicates about 5.21 days to cover, potentially increasing the risk of a short squeeze if momentum rises. The company reported an operating loss of $19 million, a decrease from $47 million in the prior-year quarter. The net loss was reported at $37 million, or $0.46 per diluted share, an improvement from $56 million, or $0.71 per diluted share, a year prior. Adjusted EPS of $(0.27) surpassed the estimated $(0.59). VS & Co. CEO, Hillary Super, expressed satisfaction with the standout third quarter performance in net sales and earnings per share, beating the high-end of the guidance. Sales of $1.472 billion exceeded the $1.410 billion estimate, showing positive growth for the company.

data.title: CPSC announces recall of INIU power banks sold on Amazon (#26-135) due to fire and burn hazards. Visit www.cpsc.gov for more info.
data.description: Today, the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) reported several recalls in collaboration with various companies. INIU is recalling power banks (26-135) sold on Amazon due to fire and burn risks. More information on these recalls can be found on the CPSC website at www.cpsc.gov.
